expectations.evidence: File contains exactly 6 epics (F1 through F6), which falls within the 3-6 range.
All 6 epics use F-IDs: F1, F2, F3, F4, F5, F6.
All epics reference valid SG-IDs from product.yaml: F1->SG1, F2->SG2, F3->SG3, F4->SG4, F5->SG5, F6->SG2. All are within the SG1-SG5 range defined in the product fixture.

All 6 epics have complete IDD fields: intent with p1/p2/p3, constraints (in_scope, out_of_scope, must_not_break), success_scenarios (given/when/then format), and failure_conditions (list). Verified across all epics F1-F6.
No E-IDs found in the file. All epics use F-IDs (F1-F6).
